mapper.select: select product_id AS id, product_name AS productName, product_type AS productType, interest_rate AS interestRate, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, term_months AS termMonths, description AS productDescription, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt from deposit_product_tbl order by product_id desc

select product_id AS id, product_name AS productName, product_type AS productType, interest_rate AS interestRate, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, term_months AS termMonths, description AS productDescription, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt from deposit_product_tbl where product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE deposit_product_tbl SET product_name = #{product.productName}, product_type = #{product.productType}, interest_rate = #{product.interestRate}, min_amount = #{product.minAmount}, max_amount = #{product.maxAmount}, term_months = #{product.termMonths}, description = #{product.productDescription}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS id, product_name AS productName, product_type AS productType, interest_rate AS interestRate, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, term_months AS termMonths, description AS productDescription, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt from savings_product_tbl ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id AS id, product_name AS productName, product_type AS productType, interest_rate AS interestRate, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, term_months AS termMonths, description AS productDescription, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM savings_product_tbl WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE savings_product_tbl SET product_name = #{product.productName}, product_type = #{product.productType}, interest_rate = #{product.interestRate}, min_amount = #{product.minAmount}, max_amount = #{product.maxAmount}, term_months = #{product.termMonths}, description = #{product.productDescription}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.dat_id AS id, a.customer_id AS customerId, a.product_id AS productId, a.account_number AS accountNumber, a.account_password AS accountPassword, a.balance, a.interest_rate AS interestRate, a.account_status AS accountStatus, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.product_name AS productName, a.nickname AS nickname FROM deposit_account_tbl a JOIN deposit_product_tbl p ON a.product_id = p.product_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.dat_id DESC

SELECT dat_id AS id, customer_id AS customerId, product_id AS productId, account_number AS accountNumber, account_password AS accountPassword, balance, interest_rate AS interestRate, account_status AS accountStatus, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM deposit_account_tbl WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.update: UPDATE deposit_account_tbl SET account_status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT a.sat_id AS id, a.customer_id AS customerId, a.product_id AS productId, a.account_number AS accountNumber, a.account_password AS accountPassword, a.balance, a.interest_rate AS interestRate, a.account_status AS accountStatus, a.monthly_amount AS monthlyAmount, a.maturity_date AS maturityDate, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.product_name AS productName FROM savings_account_tbl a JOIN savings_product_tbl p ON a.product_id = p.product_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.sat_id DESC

SELECT sat_id AS id, customer_id AS customerId, product_id AS productId, account_number AS accountNumber, account_password AS accountPassword, balance, interest_rate AS interestRate, account_status AS accountStatus, monthly_amount AS monthlyAmount, maturity_date AS maturityDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM savings_account_tbl WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO savings_account_tbl ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, monthly_amount, maturity_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, #{balance}, #{interestRate}, 'ACTIVE', #{monthlyAmount}, #{maturityDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE savings_account_tbl SET account_status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT dat_id AS accountId, transaction_type AS transactionType, amount AS transactionAmount, balance, transaction_date AS transactionDate, description AS transactionDescription FROM deposit_transaction_tbl WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

SELECT sat_id AS accountId, transaction_type AS transactionType, amount AS transactionAmount, balance, transaction_date AS transactionDate, description AS transactionDescription FROM savings_transaction_tbl WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC
SELECT balance FROM deposit_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
SELECT balance FROM savings_account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
SELECT balance FROM account_tbl WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_tbl ( account_number, transaction_type, amount, currency, comment, customer_name, account_type, transaction_date ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{transactionType}, #{transactionAmount}, 'KRW', #{transactionDescription}, #{customerId}, #{accountType}, NOW() )
